column2: Three-station cable back-end assembly line with one Stationary Assembler and one Dexterous Robotic Arm. A single AMR shuttles cables to and from Central Store 100 m away (100 ticks at 1 m/s; each tick = 1 second). The Arm handles the precision routing station (16 ticks vs. the Assembler's 28 ticks); the Assembler covers Port A and Port B. With one AMR
column3: fetch and deliver cannot run simultaneously — the line stalls periodically. Add a second AMR to compare throughput.
